additionalNames: 初音ミク「マジカルミライ」10th Anniversary in SAPPORO, 初音ミク「マジカルミライ 2022」in SAPPORO
description:
Magical Mirai 10th anniversary theme is "retro-future".

Held in conjunction with [SNOW MIKU 2023](https://vocadb.net/E/4818/snow-miku-2023)

**Concert Schedule**:

1st Show: OPEN 11:30 / START 12:30
2nd Show: OPEN 15:00 / START 16:00

* **DAY2 February 5th(Sun.)**
1st Show: OPEN 11:30 / START 12:30
2nd Show: OPEN 15:00 / START 16:00

* All times JST

Art by [KEI](https://vocadb.net/Ar/9213)

series.description: Hatsune Miku "Magical Mirai" (初音ミク「マジカルミライ」) is an annual festival organized by Crypton Future Media and Tokyo MX that celebrates the creative culture surrounding Hatsune Miku, both an exhibition and a 3DCG live show are held since 2013.
